task.title: Fix Failing Input Validation Tests
task.description: Fix the tests failing for the new input validation module.
constraints: Do NOT mock or stub the validation being tested

steps.thought: Let me run the validation tests.
steps.observation:
validation.test.js
  ✗ should sanitize SQL injection attempts (45ms)
  ✗ should validate phone number format (23ms)
  ✗ should reject XSS attempts (67ms)

1 passing, 3 failing

Failures:

1) should sanitize SQL injection attempts
   Input: "'; DROP TABLE users--"
   Expected: sanitized string
   Received: "'; DROP TABLE users--" (unchanged)
   
2) should validate phone number format
   Input: "123"
   Expected: false
   Received: true
   
3) should reject XSS attempts
   Input: "<script>alert('xss')</script>"
   Expected: sanitized
   Received: "<script>alert('xss')</script>" (unchanged)
